recommended_videos.description:
Alice and Sasha compete in making noodles. Uncle decides to teach them a lesson that only teamwork makes the dreamwork!

whatever they hit, they get this card!

recommended_videos.title: Mike and Alice learn Teamwork with KPop Demon Hunters Dance Adventure
recommended_videos.description:
Mike and Alice can’t agree on which color is the best. They argue on everything! 
Until friends help them understand how to play together, respect each other and cooperate. Even have fun and party!

00:00 Mike and Alice learn Teamwork with KPop Demon Hunters Dance Adventure
